queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the credit amount requested by the applicant as a determinant of increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with the checking account status of no checking account and reduced risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers related to the savings account status of no known savings account and decreased default likelihood.
